Description: A company is classified into an industry
A company uses technologies in operations
A company may have commercial opportunities
An opportunity is driven by one or more pain points
A pain point can be addressed by a solution
A solution is implemented using products
Companies may compete with each other
A competitor offers products in the market
A company is located in a country
A city belongs to a country
A company is exposed to risks
A won proposal may generate a contract
A case study references a customer company
A case study references products used
Customer is a role specialization of company
Vendor is a role specialization of company
Partner is a role specialization of company
Competitor is a role specialization of company
Departments may report to parent departments
A person may be associated with a role
Assets are owned or operated by companies
Services may be modeled as product specializations
KPIs are composed of or related to metrics
